data.title: BKI Outperforms Market Amidst Economic Uncertainties
data.description:
The latest update is out from BKI Investment Co. Ltd. ( (AU:BKI) ).

In March 2025, BKI outperformed the broader Australian equity market despite ongoing global economic uncertainties, delivering a total shareholder return of -1.8% compared to the S&P/ASX 300 Accumulation Index’s decline of 3.3%. Notable performances from portfolio companies included New Hope Corporation’s 19% revenue increase and Washington H. Soul Pattinson’s 27% revenue growth, both surpassing forecasts, while Brickworks Limited saw a significant rise in net profit before significant items. The results highlight BKI’s strategic focus on valuation and income amidst market volatility, benefiting stakeholders with improved dividends and returns.

More about BKI Investment Co. Ltd.

BKI Investment Co. Ltd. is a research-driven, listed investment company on the Australian Securities Exchange, managed by Contact Asset Management. The company focuses on long-term investments in profitable, high-yielding, well-managed companies, providing shareholders access to a diversified Australian equity portfolio. BKI aims to create wealth for shareholders through capital growth and increasing fully franked dividends while maintaining low costs.

YTD Price Performance: 1.21%

Average Trading Volume: 395,099

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

data.title: Mobio Technologies Announces Key Approvals from Shareholder Meeting
data.description:
Mobio Technologies ( (TSE:MBO) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Mobio Technologies Inc. announced the results of its special general meeting of shareholders, where several key resolutions were approved. These include a qualifying transaction with Tracksuit Movers Inc., a non-arm’s length private placement to raise $1.8 million, and the conversion of outstanding loans into common shares. Additionally, the company’s stock option plan was re-approved, and the board of directors was elected. The transaction awaits final acceptance from the TSX Venture Exchange.

More about Mobio Technologies

Mobio Technologies Inc. is a publicly traded company on the TSX Venture Exchange, headquartered in Vancouver, BC. The company operates Strutta.com Media Inc., a social promotions platform that aids marketers in converting potential customers from strangers to fans to customers. Strutta’s Promotions API provides a technology platform for facilitating social media competitions and campaigns for global brands.

YTD Price Performance: -3.12%

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: C$5.94M

data.title: QPM Energy Retracts CEO’s Speculative Comments on Anglo American
data.description:
QPM Energy ( (AU:QPM) ) has issued an update.

QPM Energy has issued a retraction of comments made by its CEO, Mr. Wrench, regarding the management of gas drainage wells by Anglo American. The statements, made during the company’s Annual General Meeting, were deemed speculative and inappropriate, particularly concerning an incident at the Grosvenor Mine. The retraction advises shareholders not to rely on these statements, highlighting the company’s commitment to maintaining accurate and responsible communication.

More about QPM Energy

YTD Price Performance: -33.33%

Average Trading Volume: 3,566,484

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.title: Boutique Capital Increases Stake in 5G Networks Limited
data.description:
Webcentral Ltd ( (AU:5GN) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Boutique Capital Pty Ltd, acting as the trustee for Tectonic Opportunities Fund, has increased its voting power in 5G Networks Limited from 14.41% to 15.44% as of April 2, 2025. This change reflects a strategic move by Boutique Capital to strengthen its influence within the company, potentially impacting the company’s future decisions and operations, and signaling confidence in 5G Networks’ market position.

data.title: PolarX Limited Announces Lapse of Unlisted Options
data.description:
PolarX Ltd ( (AU:PXX) ) has provided an update.

PolarX Limited has announced the lapse of 19,127,436 unlisted options with an exercise price of $0.03, which expired on April 1, 2025. This development may impact the company’s financial strategy and shareholder interests, as it involves a significant number of options that were not exercised, potentially affecting future capital raising activities.

More about PolarX Ltd

PolarX Limited operates in the mining industry, focusing on the exploration and development of mineral resources. The company is primarily involved in the extraction and production of precious and base metals, with a market focus on expanding its resource base and enhancing shareholder value.

data.title: 1844 Resources Inc. Announces Debt Settlement and Postponement
data.description:
1844 Resources Inc ( (TSE:EFF) ) has shared an update.

1844 Resources Inc. has entered into agreements to settle debts totaling $355,296.75 through the issuance of 5,815,935 common shares at a price of $0.05 per share. The company has also postponed additional debt of $281,752.57 for a period of six to twelve months. These actions are subject to necessary corporate and regulatory approvals, including from the TSX Venture Exchange, and are part of the company’s efforts to manage its financial obligations and improve its operational stability.

More about 1844 Resources Inc

1844 Resources Inc. is an exploration company focused on strategic and energetic metals, operating in underexplored regions such as Gaspé and Nunavik, Québec. The company aims to create shareholder value through the discovery of new deposits, supported by a dedicated management team.

data.title: Ohsho Food Service Corp. Reports Strong Sales Growth in March 2025
data.description:
Ohsho Food Service Corp. ( (JP:9936) ) has shared an announcement.

Ohsho Food Service Corp. reported a significant increase in sales for its company-operated stores in March 2025, with a year-over-year growth of 113.0%. The sales of existing stores also saw a rise of 111.7% compared to the previous year. This growth indicates a strong performance and potential positive impact on the company’s market position and stakeholder confidence.

More about Ohsho Food Service Corp.

Ohsho Food Service Corp. operates in the food service industry, focusing on company-operated and franchise stores. It is known for its restaurant services, primarily in Japan, and is listed on the Tokyo Stock Exchange under the stock code 9936.

data.title: Vista Group Director Sells Shares to Repay Trust’s Capital Raise Contribution
data.description:
The latest update is out from Vista Group International Ltd ( (AU:VGL) ).

Vista Group International Ltd has announced a transaction involving the sale of 500,000 ordinary shares by Director Murray Lawrence Holdaway. This sale, which represents less than 7.4% of the Holdaway and Geary Trust’s total shareholding in Vista Group, was conducted to repay amounts paid by the trust during the company’s 2020 capital raise. The transaction was approved under the company’s Securities Trading Policy, which requires directors to obtain consent for trades during closed periods.

More about Vista Group International Ltd

Vista Group International Ltd operates in the film and entertainment industry, providing software and technology solutions primarily for cinema management and distribution. The company focuses on enhancing the operational efficiency of cinemas and improving the movie-going experience through its innovative software products.

YTD Price Performance: 13.38%

Average Trading Volume: 18,546

data.title: Block, Inc. Officer Plans Sale of Class A Common Stock
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Block, Inc. Shs Chess Depository Interests Repr 1 Sh ( (AU:XYZ) ).

Block, Inc. has announced a proposed sale of securities under Rule 144 of the Securities Act of 1933. Amrita Ahuja, an officer of the company, plans to sell Class A Common Stock through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. The sale involves 1,976 shares with an aggregate market value of $111,031.44, scheduled for April 2, 2025, on the NYSE. This transaction is part of a series of sales by Ahuja, who has sold a total of 7,847 shares over the past three months, generating gross proceeds of $576,140.13. The announcement indicates no undisclosed adverse information regarding the company’s operations.
